authorMeta.name: kamirichey
text:
They say the best way to explore a city is through your stomach- so here are 7 New York City food spots I loved that totally deliver:

1️⃣ Halal Guys (Chicken & Beef Platter)
A New York street food icon that lives up to the hype. The juicy chicken, beef gyro, and that famous white sauce? Game-changer. @Halal Guys NYC 

2️⃣ Levain Bakery (Chocolate Chip Cookie)
This is the cookie Taylor Swift couldn’t stop raving about. Thick, warm, gooey, and seriously addictive—it’s love at first bite. @Levain Bakery 

3️⃣ Liberty Bagels (Rainbow Bagel + Birthday Cake Cream Cheese)
The bagel that broke Instagram. With rainbow swirls and frosting-like cream cheese, it’s as fun to eat as it is to look at. @Liberty Bagels NY 

4️⃣ Jin Mei Dumpling ($5 for 15 Dumplings)
Hidden in Chinatown, this no-frills spot serves 15 dumplings for just $5. Crispy, juicy, and full of flavor—true NYC magic.

5️⃣ Zibetto Espresso Bar (Caramel Latte)
This sleek Italian-style café is a Midtown gem. Their caramel latte is smooth, rich, and made for slow sips or quick pick-me-ups. @Zibetto_Espresso_Bar 

6️⃣ La Pecora Bianca (Pesto Pasta)
Fresh pasta, dreamy pesto, and gorgeous interiors—what more could you want? This spot is as delicious as it is aesthetic. @La Pecora Bianca 

7️⃣ 230 Fifth Rooftop (Raspberry Mojito)
Sip cocktails with jaw-dropping skyline views at 230 Fifth. The raspberry mojito is fruity, refreshing, and best enjoyed at golden hour. @230FifthRooftop 

➡️ FOLLOW @kamirichey for more travel guides 

Also shoutout to @Mallory Paige Thomas for researching half of these 🙌🏼😘

#newyorkcity #nyc #foodie #newyork #newyorkfood #travel #travelguide #traveltiktok #traveltok

authorMeta.name: nycfoodiegirll
text: one of the best dinner deals and the quality was out of this world! the steak was tender and flavorful, with the perfect crust on the outside. the fries had a good crunch on the outside with a nice squishy inside. garlic bread on the side is a must add-on. the dessert cart had the most amazing options to choose from, and they’re constantly rotating options. the chocolate cake with salted caramel frosting was nice and rich, and the hazelnut puff pastry was delicate and light. this is going to be a new repeat spot for me in nyc! @Skirt Steak NYC #nycfood #nycrestaurants #mealdeal #nyceats #foodreview

authorMeta.name: jinabaobina
text:
I would fly back to New York just for this

I already love Chinese food, but this spot made me love it even more. We ordered so much off the menu, and honestly… I’d get almost everything again. Next time, I’d probably reorder all of these and just add new dishes on top.

I wish I had more footage because this meal deserved a longer video, but here’s everything I need to say about my favorites:

📍 Antidote in Brooklyn (I think they also have a second location)

Scallion pancake $12: So flaky and perfectly crisp

Dan dan noodles $14: Chewy noodles with the perfect balance of spice and sesame

Preserved egg with tofu $15: I was hesitant at first, but this ended up being one of my favorites. The flavor and spice were so good.

Sliced pork with garlic sauce $17: I can’t believe I didn’t include this in the video… this was actually my favorite dish 

Sichuan cold noodles $12: Super flavorful with that rich peanut sauce

I miss this place so much. I wasn’t planning a trip back to New York anytime soon… but honestly, I would go back just for Antidote.

#nyceats #chinesefood #brooklyneats #nycfood

authorMeta.name: theexcursiondoctor
text:
This Is One of The Best Vegan Restaurants In New York City 🇩🇴🥘

Next Stop Vegan is a Dominican owned restaurant serving the best fusion of Dominican and Caribbean food with a plant based twist that has so much amazing flavors! This is a must visit restaurant in New York City that everyone can enjoy.

🐟They are now serving dishes with The World’s first Plant-based Salmon, Oshi Seafood and I’m still thinking about how delicious the Salmon Monfonguito is!

✨Their new Salmon con Coco Mofongo comes in a homemade Dominican coconut sauce served over mashed Garlic Mofongo thats has these rich satisfying  flavors that I can’t get over!

We even had dishes like their new Bbq Tender Ribs, Chimi Sandwich, these massive Rice Bowls, delicious Picalonga and Salmon tacos, and cheesy Bbq Truffle Rib Burger.

This spot is perfect for either casual lunch bites with friends/family or even for a great dinner vibe or date night in New York City
.
.
.
.
.
#veganrestaurant #veganeats #nyc #newyorkeats #thingstodoinnyc

authorMeta.name: theexcursiondoctor
text:
Is this one of the best Thai restaurants in New York City? 🇹🇭🍜 

Khaosan is one of my personal favorite Thai food spots in NYC, located in Brooklyn Heights.
They have flavorful curries to classic noodle dishes, the menu brings bold Thai flavors to one of Brooklyn’s most beautiful neighborhoods.
If you’re building your NYC food bucket list or constantly searching for the best restaurants in New York City, this place delivers both flavor and atmosphere.

The menu features classic Thai dishes made fresh, including favorites like Pad Thai, Drunken Noodles (Pad Kee Mao), Thai Fried Rice, Green Curry, and Panang Curry. Each dish is packed with flavor and made with ingredients that capture the balance Thai cuisine is known for; savory, spicy, sweet, and tangy.

📍WHERE:  Khaosan NYC 128 Montague St Brooklyn, NY 11201

Beyond the food, the space has a warm, modern vibe with greenery and floral accents, making it a great setting for a NYC date night, dinner with friends, or a weekend food adventure in Brooklyn.
If you’re exploring things to do in New York City for food lovers, adding Khaosan to your list of best Thai restaurants in NYC is an easy choice.

🍜 DISHES FEATURED IN VIDEO
-Chicken Satays
-Shrimp Donuts
-Crab Meat Fried Rice
-Seafood Tom Yum Hot Pot
-Panang Curry
-Pad See Ew W/ Shrimp
-Crab Rangoon

Perfect for: • Searching for the best Thai food in NYC • NYC food tours and foodie adventures • Brooklyn restaurant recommendations • A cozy New York City date night spot
